name: Africa DeepTech Challenge 2025 — Resource-Constrained Computing
description: Build a working prototype that demonstrates creative problem-solving under real-world constraints common across Africa: limited compute, intermittent connectivity, power instability, and cost-sensitive hardware. Projects must target an actual use case and be deployable on sub-$100 hardware.

criteria.name: Technical Implementation
criteria.description: Quality of engineering: code architecture, algorithm efficiency, error handling, and ability to run on resource-constrained hardware.

criteria.name: Creative Problem-Solving
criteria.description: Originality of the approach to working within constraints. Novel trade-offs, clever workarounds, and unconventional architectures.

criteria.name: Process Documentation
criteria.description: Clarity of decision logs, README, architecture diagrams, and reproducibility of the build process.

criteria.name: Usability & Relevance
criteria.description: Practical applicability to the target use case. Evidence of user testing or stakeholder feedback.

name: Africa DeepTech Challenge 2026 — AI for Africa
description: Design and build an AI-powered solution that addresses a pressing challenge on the African continent. Projects should demonstrate technical depth, cultural awareness, and a viable path to deployment. Bonus consideration for solutions that work offline or on low-bandwidth networks.

criteria.name: Technical Implementation
criteria.description: Model architecture choices, training methodology, inference optimization, and engineering quality.

criteria.name: Innovation & Originality
criteria.description: Novelty of the approach. Unique datasets, creative model adaptations, or new applications of existing techniques.

criteria.name: Documentation & Reproducibility
criteria.description: Experiment tracking, model cards, data documentation, and the ability for others to reproduce or extend the work.

criteria.name: Impact & Scalability
criteria.description: Potential to create measurable impact at scale. Viable deployment plan, cost analysis, and evidence of demand.
